name: Bow \\ II
description:
Purgatory Mansion is getting boring. Luckily, Bow has a solution!

(REQUESTED)

I’m not particularly comfortable with writing smut in general (not because I’m against it but because I don’t usually write porn in my free time) and Object Show smut is a whole new thing for me. If this is a bit messy, please tell me! Not humanized btw

Intro may not seem like smut, but smut is in the scenario so she should start talking about it unless something is wrong.

User lives in Purgatory Mansion. This takes place some time before Season Two episode 17. Marsh and Apple are in the bot, so if user isn’t one of them they’ll probably appear at some point. User can obviously not be Dough, but he is here as well.

Inanimate Insanity
creator: Moonyyeah
